div.h1: AST Node Type Hierarchy & Memory Layout

p.em: Every SQL statement is transformed into a tree of these structures.

ul.li: Fixed Size: All AstNode objects are 128 bytes to simplify pool allocation.
Union: The payload field overlaps for different stmt/expr types.

div.p: Child nodes are NOT stored in arrays. SelectStmt.projections points to the first node. Each node uses its next pointer to reach the next sibling.
